summary: Generate mode testing complete for Updates Tab in Form Submissions section. All features tested successfully: Updates tab displays combined list, View modal works, Download works (PDF for item additions, text for payment changes), Message modal with pre-filled email template works, Search filter works, and type badges display correctly.

details.updates_tab_backend: 13/14 tests passed (1 skipped due to no test agreements)

updates_tab_visibility.description: Updates tab is visible and clickable in Form Submissions section

combined_updates_list.description: Updates tab displays combined list of payment changes and item additions

view_modal.description: View button opens modal with update details (Client Information, Payment Method Change, Items Added)

download_button.description: Download button downloads PDF for item additions and text file for payment changes

message_button.description: Message button opens modal with pre-filled email template containing Dear {name}, Thrifty Curator content

search_filter.description: Search filter works on Updates tab to filter by name/email

date_sorting.description: Updates are sorted by date descending (most recent first)

type_badges.description: Correct badges displayed: Payment Change (amber), Info Update (blue), +N Items (green)

delete_endpoint.description: DELETE endpoint works for item additions (returns 404 for invalid IDs)

pdf_download_endpoint.description: PDF download endpoint works and returns application/pdf content

auth_protection.description: All admin endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Updates Tab testing complete. New spec file updates-tab.spec.ts covers all UI functionality. Backend test file test_updates_tab.py covers API endpoints. The tab combines consignment-item-additions and payment-method-changes endpoints into a unified view with View, Download, Message, and Delete actions.
